message:
refactor(sync): complete wa→ft rename and fix path-boundary matching

Three categories of changes in sync.rs:

1. Rename: All remaining "wa" references updated to "ft" (frankenterm)
   across binary paths, config roots, remote roots, workspace layout
   test paths, and doc comments. This completes the project rename that
   was started in an earlier pass.

2. Fix is_path_allowed path-boundary bug: The prefix matching logic
   used starts_with on raw strings, which meant allow_paths=["config/**"]
   would incorrectly match "config_backup/ft.toml" since "config_backup"
   starts with "config". Now normalizes separators and checks for an
   exact match or a "/" boundary after the prefix. Added test
   allow_prefix_respects_path_boundaries.

3. Harden parse_snapshot_filename: The 5-way splitn parser broke on
   version strings containing underscores (e.g. "0.1.0-beta_build").
   Replaced with a right-to-left scan that locates the 8-char hex
   workspace key, then slices version/timestamp/host from the
   surrounding segments. Added roundtrip test with underscored
   version and hostname.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
